key_drivers: Falling real yields (DFII10 1.92% Mar 13 → 1.86% Mar 18, -6bps 5-day) reverse the 0240 bearish equity/gold thesis — now the dominant bullish driver across all asset classes
Iran war / Strait of Hormuz closure sustaining oil supply disruption premium (CL BULLISH +4); WTI ~$98.48
ECB hawkish hold (2.15% MRO, hike bets rising) + BoJ hawkish lean (April hike on table) driving EUR and JPY strength vs USD
Risk-off regime (VIX 24.84, MOVE 84.88) provides safe-haven demand for GC, JPY; credit spreads widening (HY OAS 3.20%) limits RTY upside
China NBS PMI 49.0 (4-month low, sub-50 contraction) + risk-off double-weighted driving 6A BEARISH despite RBA hike to 4.10%
